hypotheses.claim: Reframing the primary_text to speak to the reader's felt need (not product features) should raise motivation_match from 2/5.
Removing competing themes and focusing every sentence on one proposition should raise angle_clarity from 3/5.
Replacing the cta with an outcome-stated version should raise cta_clarity from 2/5.
Adding named farms, geographies, or spelled-out cardinals should raise specificity from 3/5 toward 4-5 and lift composite.

hypothesis.claim: Reframing the primary_text to speak to the reader's felt need (not product features) should raise motivation_match from 2/5.

variant.primary_text:
Most of us don't anymore. We trust a label, a barcode, a brand we've never met.

FarmThru is a small experiment in changing that. Real farms. Named families. Food that came from a place you can actually picture.

Collect from Brookvale. Try one order. See if it feels different.
variant.headline: Do you know what your kids are eating?
variant.description: Farm-direct from named NSW farms. Pick up in Brookvale. No subscription, no commitment.

hypothesis.claim: Removing competing themes and focusing every sentence on one proposition should raise angle_clarity from 3/5.

variant.primary_text:
Remember when you knew where your food came from?

Not the brand. The farm. The family. The paddock down the road.

FarmThru reconnects you to that. Every product traces to a named NSW farm. Beef from the Hunter. Eggs from Tamworth. Vegetables from the Hawkesbury.

No middlemen. No mystery supply chains. Just farmers and the people who eat what they grow.

Collect from Brookvale. Order what you want, when you want.
variant.headline: Remember knowing your farmer?
variant.description: Farm-direct from named NSW farms. Collect from Brookvale.

hypothesis.claim: Replacing the cta with an outcome-stated version should raise cta_clarity from 2/5.

variant.primary_text:
Somewhere along the way, we stopped knowing who grew our food.

FarmThru is changing that. Every week, named NSW farmers send their best produce to our Brookvale hub. You collect it. You learn their names. You taste the difference.

No subscription. No supermarket markup. Just food with a face behind it.

Leave your email and we'll tell you the moment collection opens near you.
variant.headline: Come meet the farmers we forgot
variant.description: Farm-direct from named NSW farms. Collect from Brookvale, no commitment.

hypothesis.claim: Adding named farms, geographies, or spelled-out cardinals should raise specificity from 3/5 toward 4-5 and lift composite.

variant.primary_text:
When did you last shake the hand of the farmer who raised your beef?

Ours are Andrew and Tahlia at Greenham in the Northern Tablelands. Pasture-raised, MSA-graded, processed within 200km. Then driven straight to Brookvale.

No supermarket buyer. No 8-week cold storage. No mystery.

FarmThru is a farm-direct grocery hub. 47 NSW producers. One collection point. Order Friday, collect Saturday from 10am to 2pm. No subscription, no minimum.

Come meet the people growing your food.
variant.headline: Meet the farmers behind your dinner
variant.description: 47 named NSW farms. Collect Saturdays in Brookvale. No subscription.
